name: Resolve-Path

options.name: -Credential
options.description: Specifies a user account that has permission to perform this action. The default is the current user.

name: -LiteralPath
-PSPath
-LP
options.description: Specifies the path to be resolved. The value of the LiteralPath parameter is used exactly as typed. No characters are interpreted as wildcard characters. If the path includes escape characters, enclose it in single quotation marks (`'`). Single quotation marks tell PowerShell not to interpret any characters as escape sequences.

options.name: -Path
options.description: Specifies the PowerShell path to resolve. This parameter is required. You can also pipe a path string to `Resolve-Path`. Wildcard characters are permitted.

options.name: -Relative
options.description: Indicates that this cmdlet returns a relative path.

description: Resolves the wildcard characters in a path, and displays the path contents.
